enGB: Phoenix's Scaling Cantrips
Enable Detailed Logs

REQUIRES RESTART
Turn this on and restart your game to get detailed logs for capturing bug reports.
This will probably cause lag as the logging is extremely detailed, but this makes it a lot easier to identify and fix bugs quickly.
zhCN:
需要重启
开启该选项并重启游戏，获得用于报告BUG的详细日志。
可能造成卡顿，但是有助于快速找到并修复BUG。
ruRU:
ТРЕБУЕТСЯ ПЕРЕЗАГРУЗКА

Включите эту опцию и перезапустите игру, чтобы получить подробный лог, если хотите отправить баг-репорт.
Данная настройка может вызвать заметное снижение производительности, но позволит проще выявить и устранить ошибки.
esES:
Requiere reiniciar
Encienda esto y reinicie su juego para obtener registros detallados para capturar informes de errores.
Esto probablemente causará retraso ya que el registro es extremadamente detallado, pero esto hace que sea mucho más fácil identificar y arreglar los errores rápidamente.

enGB: Makes existing attack cantrips (and Virtue) scale, adds cantrips for all elements (fire/lightning/ice/acid/sonic) and range (touch/ray) combos, and adds customizability for all of them
Enable Scaling for Cantrips
Select Maximum Dice For Attack Cantrips
Select Caster Levels Per Die
Add Lesser Corrosive Touch
Add Firebolt
Add Burning Touch
Add Frosty Touch
Add Lesser Shocking Grasp
Add Painful Note
Add Dissonant Touch
Add Jolt To Magus
Add Sonic Spells to Arrowsong Minstrel
Adds Painful Note and Dissonant Touch to Arrowsong Minstrel. Requires Character Options Plus

You cause a spark of fire to strike the target with a successful ranged {g|Encyclopedia:TouchAttack}touch attack{/g}. The {g|Encyclopedia:Spell}spell{/g} deals {g|Encyclopedia:Dice}1d3{/g} points of {g|Encyclopedia:Energy_Damage}fire damage{/g}, plus another die per two caster levels past first (maximum 6d3).
Burning Touch
You sheath your hand in fire and make a touch attack against the target. The {g|Encyclopedia:Spell}spell{/g} deals {g|Encyclopedia:Dice}1d3{/g} points of {g|Encyclopedia:Energy_Damage}fire damage{/g}

You sheath your hand in fire and make a touch attack against the target. The {g|Encyclopedia:Spell}spell{/g} deals {g|Encyclopedia:Dice}1d4{/g} points of {g|Encyclopedia:Energy_Damage}fire damage{/g}, plus another die per two caster levels past first (maximum 6d3).
Painful Note

You cause a bolt of destructive resonance to strike the target with a successful ranged {g|Encyclopedia:TouchAttack}touch attack{/g}. The {g|Encyclopedia:Spell}spell{/g} deals {g|Encyclopedia:Dice}1d2{/g} points of {g|Encyclopedia:Energy_Damage}sonic damage{/g}

You cause a bolt of destructive resonance to strike the target with a successful ranged {g|Encyclopedia:TouchAttack}touch attack{/g}. The {g|Encyclopedia:Spell}spell{/g} deals {g|Encyclopedia:Dice}1d2{/g} points of {g|Encyclopedia:Energy_Damage}sonic damage{/g}, plus another die per two caster levels past first (maximum 6d3).
Dissonant Touch

You sheath your hand in destructive vibrations and make a touch attack against the target. The {g|Encyclopedia:Spell}spell{/g} deals {g|Encyclopedia:Dice}1d3{/g} points of {g|Encyclopedia:Energy_Damage}sonic damage{/g}.

You sheath your hand in destructive vibrations and make a touch attack against the target. The {g|Encyclopedia:Spell}spell{/g} deals {g|Encyclopedia:Dice}1d3{/g} points of {g|Encyclopedia:Energy_Damage}sonic damage{/g}, plus another die per two caster levels past first (maximum 6d3).
Lesser Corrosive Touch

You sheath your hand in acid and make a touch attack against the target. The {g|Encyclopedia:Spell}spell{/g} deals {g|Encyclopedia:Dice}1d4{/g} points of {g|Encyclopedia:Energy_Damage}acid damage{/g}.

You sheath your hand in acid and make a touch attack against the target. The {g|Encyclopedia:Spell}spell{/g} deals {g|Encyclopedia:Dice}1d4{/g} points of {g|Encyclopedia:Energy_Damage}acid damage{/g}, plus another die per two caster levels past first (maximum 6d4).
Lesser Shocking Grasp

You sheath your hand in electricty and make a touch attack against the target. The {g|Encyclopedia:Spell}spell{/g} deals {g|Encyclopedia:Dice}1d4{/g} points of {g|Encyclopedia:Energy_Damage}electricty damage{/g}.

You sheath your hand in electricty and make a touch attack against the target. The {g|Encyclopedia:Spell}spell{/g} deals {g|Encyclopedia:Dice}1d4{/g} points of {g|Encyclopedia:Energy_Damage}electricty damage{/g}, plus another die per two caster levels past first (maximum 6d4).
Frosty Touch
You sheath your hand in ice and make a touch attack against the target. The {g|Encyclopedia:Spell}spell{/g} deals {g|Encyclopedia:Dice}1d4{/g} points of {g|Encyclopedia:Energy_Damage}cold damage{/g}.

You sheath your hand in ice and make a touch attack against the target. The {g|Encyclopedia:Spell}spell{/g} deals {g|Encyclopedia:Dice}1d4{/g} points of {g|Encyclopedia:Energy_Damage}cold damage{/g}, plus another die per two caster levels past first (maximum 6d4).

You unleash your divine powers against a single target. The target takes {g|Encyclopedia:Dice}1d3{/g} points of divine {g|Encyclopedia:Damage}damage{/g}, plus another die per two caster levels past first (maximum 6d3). A successful {g|Encyclopedia:Saving_Throw}save{/g} halves the damage.

You cause a spark of electricity to strike the target with a successful ranged {g|Encyclopedia:TouchAttack}touch attack{/g}. The {g|Encyclopedia:Spell}spell{/g} deals {g|Encyclopedia:Dice}1d3{/g} points of {g|Encyclopedia:Energy_Damage}electricity damage{/g}, plus another die per two caster levels past first (maximum 6d3).

A ray of freezing air and ice projects from your pointing finger. You must succeed on a ranged {g|Encyclopedia:TouchAttack}touch attack{/g} with the ray to deal {g|Encyclopedia:Damage}damage{/g} to a target. The ray deals {g|Encyclopedia:Dice}1d3{/g} points of {g|Encyclopedia:Energy_Damage}cold damage{/g}, plus another die per two caster levels past first (maximum 6d3).

You fire a small orb of acid at the target. You must succeed on a ranged {g|Encyclopedia:TouchAttack}touch attack{/g} to hit your target. The orb deals 1–3 ({g|Encyclopedia:Dice}1d3{/g}) points of {g|Encyclopedia:Energy_Damage}acid damage{/g}, plus another die per two caster levels past first (maximum 6d3).

You direct a ray of positive energy. You must make a ranged {g|Encyclopedia:TouchAttack}touch attack{/g} to hit, and if the ray hits an undead creature, it deals {g|Encyclopedia:Dice}1d6{/g} points of {g|Encyclopedia:Damage}damage{/g} to it, plus another die per two caster levels past first (maximum 6d6)

With a {g|Encyclopedia:TouchAttack}touch{/g}, you infuse a creature with a tiny surge of life, granting the subject 1 temporary hit point, plus another per two caster levels after first to a maximum of 10
